fields.heading: Choose the next step that fits your role.
fields.body: Hotel social commerce explained: how hotels turn social posts, partner recommendations, bio links, QR codes, and content into measurable booking paths.

cards.title: Facebook post
cards.body: A weekend package post can connect directly to the promoted offer and Booking Engine path.

cards.title: Partner recommendation
cards.body: A Partner can recommend a hotel collection or package with attribution attached.

cards.title: QR code
cards.body: A printed or event QR code can open a bookable hotel offer instead of a static page.

items.question: Is hotel social commerce the same as social media marketing?
items.answer: No. Social media marketing creates attention. Hotel social commerce connects that attention to a specific booking or inquiry path.

items.question: What should hotels make bookable first?
items.answer: Start with clear packages, rooms, dining, spa, experiences, events, and offers that are easy to understand from a single social post.

items.question: Can Partners use social commerce?
items.answer: Yes. Partners can turn recommendations into bookable cards, storefronts, or links when hotel supply and attribution are connected.

items.question: Where does Wink fit?
items.answer: Wink connects social content, partner assets, storefronts, and Booking Engine paths inside one commerce layer - with 6-month attribution and 5.5% all-in on every booking.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.

faqQuestions: Is hotel social commerce the same as social media marketing?
What should hotels make bookable first?
